name: Aryan Hossain
bio: Met in university during freshman year. We used to pull all-nighters before exams. Now he works as a software engineer in Dhaka.

name: Nadia Rahman
bio: My first team lead at the internship. She taught me how to write clean code and gave honest feedback. We still catch up regularly.

name: James Okafor
bio: Connected on Twitter/X over a shared love of open source. Never met in person but feel like we've known each other for years.

name: Priya Sharma
bio: Grew up on the same street. We have been friends since we were 8. She just got married and moved to Bangalore.

name: Lucas Mendes
bio: Roommate for two years in university. We spent way too many nights gaming instead of studying. He is now doing his masters in Brazil.

name: Sara Al-Amin
bio: Worked together on a freelance project. She is a brilliant UI designer and always pushes back on my half-baked ideas in the best way.

name: Tanvir Islam
bio: We met at a local programming meetup and instantly clicked. He is one of the few people I can talk to about both code and life.

name: Emily Nguyen
bio: A senior developer who reviewed one of my open source PRs and left incredibly thoughtful feedback. She has been a quiet mentor ever since.
